calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Shawn Curtis and Carolyn C. Sanchez; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Names of minor 1. Tamia Joan Sanchez to Tamia Joan Gordon; Minor: 2. Elijah King Sanchez to Elijah King Gordon; Minor 3. Gabriella Grace Sanchez to Gabirella Grace Gordon. The court also grants the Petition of Shawn Curtiz Sanchez to Shawn Curtis Gordon.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Reset To Feb-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
